answers.project_description: An institutional-grade toolkit for managing BTC collateral through automated ratio spreads and convex hedging.
answers.problem_statement: Existing portfolio trackers are USD-centric and fail to properly model BTC-denominated collateral constraints and inverse payouts. Furthermore, managing complex ratio spreads like AIRS manually introduces emotional friction, requires constant monitoring, and leads to calculation errors during extreme volatility.
answers.target_users: Solo algorithmic/systematic traders running inverse options strategies on Deribit.
key_goals: Grow BTC stack count regardless of USD price.
Ensure zero liquidation risk (survive 50% crash or 100% surge).
answers.design_principles: Clarity over complexity (Focus on critical metrics like Margin % and Liquidation distance).
answers.backend_framework: FastAPI / standalone scheduler for CRON jobs
answers.database: SQLite (Focus on DVOL historical tracking and custom Trade ID mappings)
answers.tdd_strictness: Moderate - tests highly encouraged, but not blocking for simple features.
answers.code_review_requirements: Required for non-trivial changes (e.g. core math, backend logic)
